properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC signing secret for JWT tokens. Must be at least 32 characters. Override via JWT_SECRET env var in production.

properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of origins allowed by CORS. Override via CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var in production.

properties.name: rate-limit.auth.max-requests
properties.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per IP per window on /api/auth/** endpoints.

properties.name: rate-limit.auth.window-seconds
properties.description: Fixed-window duration in seconds for the auth endpoint rate limiter.
